import json
with open\('/Users/gimtaegong/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/side_project/llm-field-notes/001-ocr-model-shootout/OCR_모델_성능_비용_비교.ipynb'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)
for i, cell in enumerate\(nb['cells']\):
    if cell['cell_type'] == 'markdown':
        src = ''.join\(cell['source']\)
        print\(f'=== Cell {i} ==='\)
        print\(src[:600]\)
        print\(\)
")

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json

path = '/Users/gimtaegong/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/side_project/llm-field-notes/002-gemini-image-at-scale/gemini_image_optimization.ipynb'

with open\(path\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

# URL이 포함된 출력 셀 ID
url_cells = {'c11', 'c31', 'c41'}

for cell in nb['cells']:
    if cell.get\('id'\) in url_cells:
        cell['outputs'] = []
        cell['execution_count'] = None

with open\(path, 'w'\) as f:
    json.dump\(nb, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=1\)

print\("완료"\)
EOF)
